description: pandas is a fast, powerful, flexible and easy to use open source data analysis and manipulation tool, built on top of the Python programming language.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/pandas && python3 pandas.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/pandas && python3 pandas.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/pandas && python3 pandas.py --help`. Data analysis and manipulation library.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the ai category. Fits when the engagement needs: Data analysis and manipulation library.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Data analysis and manipulation library.

name: pandas

trust.notes: Operator-curated Python library. The pip name is resolved from PyPI; the import name is verified against the registry.
